info.title: wiliwili
info.author: xfangfang
info.details:
wiliwili is an Unofficial 3rd party Bilibili client, which provides switch users with the possibility to watch videos from Bilibili.

Bilibili is a video website mainly for Chinese users, so the default language setting is Chinese.

Because of copyright issues, videos refreshed using this app are different in different regions of the world.

changelog:
v1.6.0
💡macOS 和 Windows 分别推出了适合 老系统/老设备 的版本，对于新用户，请先运行默认版，如有问题再尝试这些专门适配版。

 相关链接 :
来 wiki 看看 wiliwili 还能玩出什么花样来： https://github.com/xfangfang/wiliwili/wiki

SteamDeck 防锁屏插件： https://github.com/xfangfang/DeckyInhibitScreenSaver

Xbox 版暂停维护：https://github.com/xfangfang/wiliwili/issues/468issuecomment-3817713715

 v1.6.0 更新说明 :
- 【修复】非登录用户无法获取视频链接
- 【修复】搜索页偶现报错
- 【修复】无法获取直播子分区列表
- 【修复】部分情况下无法获取到用户的登录状态，感谢 @ WsureDev
- 【修复】部分情况下 DLNA 投屏崩溃，感谢@ abfactor
- 【优化】移除不支持显示的搜索结果（如：课程）
- 【优化】播放器TV模式下进度条选中拖拽更丝滑 (播放器TV模式入口：界面设置 -> 界面风格）
- 【新增】播放器TV模式下，OSD隐藏时支持左右方向键调整进度
- 【新增】进度条拖拽时显示缩略图
- 【新增】支持通过修改配置文件更换应用主题色 （见 wiki -> 自定义应用主题色）
- 【新增】播放器应用内全屏时自动窗口全屏（PC Only，入口：界面设置 -> 窗口）
- 【新增】进入播放页后播放器自动全屏（入口：播放设置 -> 其他设置）
- 【其他】更新 flatpak 的 runtime，更新 fmt 依赖库，感谢 @dragonflylee 
- 【隐藏功能】进入分P视频时，在历史进度弹出时按弹幕快捷键可以跳转进度


 Change log:
- [Fixed] non-logged-in users cannot obtain video links
- [Fixed] Occasional errors on search page
- [Fixed] Failed to fetch live streaming sub-section list
- [Fixed] User login status undetectable in some cases. Thanks to @WsureDev
- [Fixed] DLNA crashes in some cases. Thanks to @abfactor
- [Improved] Remove unsupported search results (e.g., courses)
- [Improved] Smoother progress bar dragging in player's TV mode
- [New] In player's TV mode, adjust progress with arrow keys when OSD is hidden
- [New] Show thumbnails when dragging progress bar
- [New] Change app theme color via config file (see wiki)
- [New] Auto full-screen window when player is full-screen in-app (PC only, go to Interface Settings -> Window)
- [New] Player auto full-screen upon entering playback page (go to Playback Settings -> Other Settings)
- [Others] Updated the runtime of flatpak and fmt library. Thanks to @dragonflylee


Please refer to the GitHub release page for detailed information.

v1.5.3
💡macOS 和 Windows 分别推出了适合 老系统/老设备 的版本，对于新用户，请先运行默认版，如有问题再尝试这些专门适配版。

 相关链接 :
来 wiki 看看 wiliwili 还能玩出什么花样来： https://github.com/xfangfang/wiliwili/wiki

Xbox：https://github.com/xfangfang/wiliwili/issues/468

SteamDeck 防锁屏插件： https://github.com/xfangfang/DeckyInhibitScreenSaver

 v1.5.3 更新说明 :
- 【修复】PC：重新添加被误移除的 全屏 选项
- 【修复】Switch：重新编译以适配最新系统
- 【优化】依赖与构建脚本更新，平台兼容性提升 感谢 @barracuda156 @Puqns67 @mochaaP @dragonflylee
- 【新增】直播间新样式（入口：界面设置 -> 直播间侧边栏弹幕数量）感谢 @4fuu
- 【新增】支持杜比全景声和无损音频 （入口：播放设置 -> 视频音质）感谢 @maxinglo
- 【新增】自定义快捷键支持更多的键盘按键配置 感谢 @donmor
- 【新增】在关于页面显示 ffmpeg 和 mpv 的版本 感谢 @dragonflylee


 Change log:
- [Fixed] PC: The accidentally removed “Fullscreen” option is back  
- [Fixed] NintendoSwitch: Recompiled for the latest system
- [Improved] Dependencies and build scripts updated — thanks to @barracuda156 @Puqns67 @mochaaP @dragonflylee  
- [New] New live room UI style (find it under UI → Live Sidebar Danmaku Count) — thanks to @4fuu  
- [New] Dolby Atmos and Hi-Res audio support (Playback → Audio quality) — thanks to @maxinglo  
- [New] Custom hot-keys now cover even more keyboard combinations — thanks to @donmor  
- [New] About page now shows ffmpeg and mpv version strings — thanks to @dragonflylee

Please refer to the GitHub release page for detailed information.

v1.5.2
💡macOS 和 Windows 分别推出了适合 老系统/老设备 的版本，对于新用户，请先运行默认版，如有问题再尝试这些专门适配版。

 相关链接 :
来 wiki 看看 wiliwili 还能玩出什么花样来： https://github.com/xfangfang/wiliwili/wiki

Xbox：https://github.com/xfangfang/wiliwili/issues/468

SteamDeck 防锁屏插件： https://github.com/xfangfang/DeckyInhibitScreenSaver

 v1.5.2 更新说明 :
- 【修复】PSV 开启缩放后，全屏视频下方有一像素背景色
- 【修复】PSV ABXY 按钮交换功能失效
- 【新增】Linux 播放性能提升（需要系统支持EGL）
- 【新增】PC 和 NS 支持自定义键盘快捷键
- 【新增】PC 端按键操作时自动隐藏鼠标
- 【新增】直播间新样式（入口：界面设置 -> 直播间侧边栏弹幕数量）
- 【新增】消息对话框支持跳转番剧视频消息
- 【修复】消息对话框点击崩溃
- 【修复】修复直播间无弹幕问题
- 【修复】部分用户无法正常获取视频链接
- 【修复】排行榜页面不更新的问题

 Change log:
- [Fix] PSV After enabling scaling, there is a one-pixel line below the video
- [Fix] PSV ABXY button swap function is not working
- [New] Mouse cursor now auto-hides after keyboard input on PC
- [New] Improved Linux playback performance (requires EGL support)
- [New] Customizable hotkeys now supported on PC and Nintendo Switch
- [New] New live room UI style (toggle under UI → Live Sidebar Danmaku Count)
- [New] Message dialogs now support jumping to anime/video messages
- [Fixed] Crash when clicking in some message dialogs
- [Fixed] Live room danmaku not appearing
- [Fixed] Some users unable to fetch video URLs
- [Fixed] Ranking page not updating

Please refer to the GitHub release page for detailed information.

 Thanks to:
- @dragonflylee Windows related issues and other improvements 
- @4fuu Live room related issues
- @PJ-568 Optimize GitHub Pages Build Process
- @pugaizai Optimize flatpak scripts

[Added]: Highlight search keywords

[Added]: Support jumping to specified videos from the chat

[Added]: Several custom configurations added (see Wiki)

[Fixed]: Some videos fail to auto-replay

[Fixed]: Subtitles display incorrectly

[Fixed]: Video card icons not displayed on some systems.

[Fixed]: OSD doesn't auto-hide after using shortcuts.

[Fixed]: Clicking on one's own activity replies does not lead to the corresponding activity

[Optimized]: Improved network request speed

[Optimized]: Prevent MPV caching shaders locally

[Optimized]: Change to HTTP after disabling TLS verification

[Optimized]: Minor UI tweaks, performance improvements, and subtle bug fixes
